title: AZ-104: Manage identities and governance in Azure
summary: AZ-104: Manage identities and governance in Azure

sections.title: AZ-104: Manage identities and governance in Azure
sections.summary: AZ-104: Manage identities and governance in Azure

lessons.title: Understand Microsoft Entra ID
lessons.content_md:
This module equips learners to describe Microsoft Entra ID - a cloud-based identity and access management service. They'll compare it with AD DS, understand its role as a directory for cloud services, and learn about its security features. They'll also learn about Microsoft Entra Domain Services.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/understand-azure-active-directory/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Create, configure, and manage identities
lessons.content_md:
Access to cloud-based workloads needs to be controlled centrally by providing a definitive identity for each user and resource. You can ensure employees and vendors have just enough access to do their job.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-configure-manage-identities/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Describe the core architectural components of Azure
lessons.content_md:
Describe the core architectural components of Azure

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-core-architectural-components-of-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Describe the core architectural components of Azure

lessons.title: Azure Policy initiatives
lessons.content_md:
Azure Policy initiatives are a collection of Azure policy definitions that are grouped together toward a specific goal or purpose. By consolidating multiple Azure policies into a single item, Azure Policy initiatives allow centralized control and enforcement of configurations across Azure resources.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/sovereignty-policy-initiatives/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Secure your Azure resources with Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC)
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Azure role-based access control to effectively manage your team's access to Azure resources.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-azure-resources-with-rbac/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Secure your Azure resources with Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC)

lessons.title: Allow users to reset their password with Microsoft Entra self-service password reset
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to allow users to reset their password with Microsoft Entra self-service password reset.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/allow-users-reset-their-password/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Allow users to reset their password with Microsoft Entra self-service password reset

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica AZ-104: Manage identities and governance in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **AZ-104: Manage identities and governance in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
